description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you cast a spell that deals damage, you gain a +1 trait bonus to the total damage dealt. This damage is considered force damage regardless of the type of damage dealt by the spell. Something Missing? This previously had a requirement or prerequisite of citizenship of a specific nation or membership in a specific faction. We are not legally allowed to reference these nations or factions. GMs should consider whether such requirements suit their campaign or not. If you wish to see the original wording it is probably available on our sister site pathfindercommunity.net.
